creator: freebsd-questions@herveybayaustralia.com.au
text:
Andriy's fix works for me on 8.0. Thank you!

FWIW I tried both Makefile and cli, cli failed stage2(?), Makefile 
worked a treat and survived portupgrade run (Commented out BROKEN in 
Makefile- couldn't find a way around that: couldn't get TRYBROKEN to 
work here, only worked as ordinary make).

Now I'm all updated. Cheers guys :)
